buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] hover:bg-[#00247D] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors border border-transparent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 text-[#0B1120] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-gray-100 text-[#0B1120] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors

cards.marketing: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-none p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-none p-6 shadow-sm

inputs.default: border-gray-300 rounded-none bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-transparent text-sm
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500 mb-1 block

layout_strategies.hero: Asymmetrical split. Left: massive typographic statement ('ENGINEERS DON\'T LIKE SURPRISES.') + BOM CTA. Right: bleeding edge technical image or Blueprint aesthetic. Generous negative space.
layout_strategies.product_catalog: Dense 'Control Room' grid. Table-heavy layouts with fixed headers. Use IBM Plex Mono for grades (e.g., 316L, Duplex 2205). Filters on a collapsible left sidebar.
layout_strategies.services_industries: The 'Grid Borders' look. Exposed skeleton (border-r, border-b on grid items). No rounded corners.
layout_strategies.footer: Dark mode flip. bg-[#0B1120] text-white. Massive 'REQUEST BOM QUOTE' CTA text at 8vw. Py-32 spacing.

hero_background.description: Clean modern testing laboratory for steel alloy metallurgy, precise and high-tech.

industry_offshore.description: Oil rig offshore representing the Marine and Oil & Gas industries served.

quality_inspection.description: Engineer hands measuring with calipers and blueprints, for Quality Testing & Inspection page.

product_pipes.description: Close up of complex industrial pipes, representing the product catalog (Carbon/Stainless/Alloys).

motion.hover: Subtle translate-y, hard shadows appearing on hover. No bouncy scaling.
motion.page_load: Fade in with slight upward slide (framer-motion).
motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for premium heavy industrial feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for marketing pages to allow for the 'Technical Grid' exposed skeleton layouts. Do not trap marketing content inside Shadcn Cards.
For the admin dashboard and product catalog, use Shadcn tables, but style them densely (Control Room archetype). Use IBM Plex Mono for all data/grades.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for all icons (e.g., `<Database weight='duotone' />`). It fits the engineering vibe perfectly. Run: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`
Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (forms, buttons, links).
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' effect on the top sticky navigation (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200`).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Must use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'IBM Plex Sans'. Import them via Google Fonts or standard CDNs in index.css.
Never center-align large blocks of text. Maintain a strict left-aligned rigid structure for technical authority.
